title: October 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 19''' is the 292nd day of the year (293nd in leap years). There are 73 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[John Lithgow]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Jon Favreau]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Yayan Ruhian]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Vanessa Marshall]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Lee Isaac Chung]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 67|''Star Wars'' (1977) 67]] released.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 18|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 18]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[The Curse of the Jindas]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – "[[The Pirates of Tarnoonga]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 122|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 122]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4]]'' published.
*2005 – [[Republic 78|''Republic'' 78]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 66|''Star Wars Magazine UK'' 66]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knight Errant: Influx]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2011]] – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 3|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 3]] published.
*[[2020]] – A sneak peek of ''[[Star Wars]]: [[Star Wars: The Mandalorian]] [[The Mandalorian Season Two|Season Two]]'' is released on [[Wikipedia:Monday Night Football|''Monday Night Football'']].
*[[2021]] – [[Jack Angel]] dies.
*[[2022]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 28|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 28]] published.
*2022 – "[[Announcement]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' released.
<noinclude>
